1.name: Кладовщик
1.description: Погрузка и разгрузка груза в складском районе.

2.name: Батрак
2.description: Работать в полях, ухаживать за урожаем и скотом.

3.name: Бармен
3.description: Подавать напитки и контролировать посетителей в таверне.

5.name: Помощник кузнеца
5.description: Помогите кузнецу выковать оружие и инструменты.

6.name: Сборщик компонентов заклинаний
6.description: Собирайте редкие магические ингредиенты в опасных местах.

7.name: Помощник алхимика
7.description: Смешивайте зелья и управляйте алхимической лабораторией.

8.name: Реставратор магических артефактов
8.description: Ремонт и восстановление поврежденных магических предметов.

9.name: Caravan Guard
9.description: Protect merchant caravans from bandits and monsters.

10.name: Arena Fighter
10.description: Fight in the arena for prize money and glory.

11.name: Monster Exterminator
11.description: Clear out monster infestations from civilian areas.

12.name: Pickpocketing
12.description: Steal from unsuspecting marks in crowded areas.

14.name: Burglary
14.description: Break into a building and steal valuables.

16.name: Locksmith
16.description: Create and repair locks for clients.

20.name: Courier
20.description: Deliver packages and messages across the city.

100.name: Permit Inspector
100.description: Inspect magical practitioners for proper permits and licensing.

101.name: Ritual Supervisor
101.description: Ensure magical rituals follow Guild protocols exactly.

102.name: Anti-Technology Enforcer
102.description: Seek out and destroy illegal techno-magical fusion devices.

103.name: Magitech Engineer
103.description: Develop experimental fusion of magic and machinery.

104.name: Spell Categorization Clerk
104.description: Meticulously categorize spells into the 92 distinct schools.

105.name: Document Redactor
105.description: Remove dangerous knowledge from historical texts.

106.name: Artifact Thief
106.description: Steal historical artifacts for the Foundation's collection.

107.name: Silent Librarian
107.description: Maintain the archives and permanently silence noisy patrons.

108.name: Propaganda Writer
108.description: Craft convincing misinformation for public consumption.

109.name: Internal Investigator
109.description: Root out information leaks within the Foundation.

110.name: Market Manipulator
110.description: Manipulate markets for profit through any means necessary.

111.name: Oil Extraction Overseer
111.description: Maximize oil extraction efficiency through infernal optimization.

112.name: High-Speed Courier
112.description: Deliver packages at breakneck speeds, worshipping velocity.

113.name: Fuel Monopoly Enforcer
113.description: Ensure the Seven Sisters maintain total fuel market control.

114.name: Divine Chaos Agent
114.description: Spread discord and disruption in the name of the Goddess of Chaos.

124.name: Vatican Scribe
124.description: Transcribe and maintain sacred texts and church documents.

127.name: Battle Nun Trainee
127.description: Train in both scripture and combat as a Vatican special forces operative.

128.name: Night Watchman
128.description: Guard property through the dangerous night hours.

129.name: Fisherman
129.description: Catch fish for sale at the market.
